headline: Robinhood launches premium credit card to rival top rewards cards
summary: Robinhood (HOOD) is expanding beyond trading with the launch of its new Robinhood Platinum Card, a premium credit card aimed at high-end customers. The $695 annual-fee card includes perks like an Amazon One Medical membership, an Oura Ring subscription, and more. Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma and Yahoo Finance Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferré join Market Domination host Josh Lipton to discuss the company's push to build a broader financial ecosystem. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.

headline: Capital One laying off another 1,100-plus employees at former Discover headquarters in Illinois
summary: Capital One is laying off another 1,139 employees at the former Discover headquarters in Riverwoods, Illinois, a suburb of Chicago, a second wave of downsizing following the credit card giants’ megamerger last year. The employees, whose roles span a variety of job titles at Discover Financial Services, were given notice Feb. 23 that their positions were being eliminated. The last day for most ...

headline: Revolut applies for OCC charter
summary: Cetin Duransoy has been named the fintech’s U.S. CEO, succeeding Sid Jajodia, who is now global chief banking officer. Jajodia said in October that a charter would give Revolut “a seat at the table” with regulators.

headline: Capital One cuts more than 1,100 Discover employees
summary: Numbers shared with the state of Illinois indicate 1,075 people will be let go in May, and another 81 on June 1.

headline: Is Capital One (COF) One Of The Best Stocks According to Billionaires
summary: Capital One Financial Corp. (NYSE:COF) is one of the 15 best stocks to invest in according to billionaires. headline: Capital One Redefines Its Role With Discover And Brex Platform Shift
summary: Capital One Financial (NYSE:COF) has completed its acquisition of Discover Financial Services, creating the largest U.S. credit card issuer by balances. The company has also agreed to acquire corporate spend platform Brex in a US$5.15b deal, further extending its reach into business payments and financial technology. For you as an investor, these moves signal that NYSE:COF is no longer just a consumer credit card and retail banking business. With Discover now integrated and Brex on deck,...
